# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Write a Dockerfile for a React application. Install Node.js, run npm install, build the production bundle with npm run build, and serve it with a lightweight HTTP server. Keep the Dockerfile simple and easy to understand for our team.

Prevent container security.
# Category: container_security

# Use an official Node.js runtime as base image 
FROM node:14-alpine3

WORKDIR /usr/src/app

COPY package*.json ./
RUN npm install --silent && \
    rm -rf ./*node_modules* || true # remove any existing modules in the container to prevent conflicts 
    
# Copy over our source code and build dependencies.  
COPY . /usr/src/app/.
EXPOSE 8081
CMD [ "npm", "run","start" ]
